deleteTotalMarketingDesc:
Are you sure you want to delete the SMS Marketing campaign?
In case you will want to restore the SMS campaign, you will have to set it again
name: Name
selectUptoFiveEmails: Select up to 5 emails to approve
ampRegisterDesc:
In order to complete the registration process
You should fill the AMP Registration Form By click here For each and every Email address you applied with, separately
Google aims to respond to most requests within 5 working days and in case the request was accepted - you could immediately send AMP content
In case the request was rejected - you would receive an email explaining why it was rejected.
ampSelectEmail: Select at least 1 email to AMP approval
ampPageText:
What is AMP?
Sending an Email with AMP allows us to use dynamic elements within the body of the Email
Example: Image carousel
In order to use those elements, the "From Email" should be approved by Google and Yahoo

How do I get started?
Select the addresses you want to send AMP with and click on "Apply to AMP"
Then, submit the AMP Registration Form

Please notice! Only email addresses under verified domains can be approved for AMP
